description: Hierarchy declaration for jpcite's 3 OpenAPI surface tiers (full 220 path superset, agent-safe 34 path subset, gpt30 30 path slim). Each tier is a strict subset of the next; a client that consumes the slim profile MUST resolve any unknown operationId by walking up to the next-larger profile.

tiers.description: Complete REST surface used by the FastAPI runtime + SDK generators (Postman / OpenAPI Generator / openapi-python-client). Includes account, billing, webhooks, and admin paths intentionally excluded from the AI-agent profiles.

Agent-safe subset for Claude tools, Cursor MCP store, and ChatGPT plugin-style integrations. Excludes account creation, billing modification, and admin endpoints; preserves all evidence + search + retrieval surfaces.
ChatGPT Custom GPT 30-path slim profile. OpenAI's Custom GPT Actions builder caps at 30 paths per spec; this profile is the curated minimum-viable evidence + search surface for that constraint.

hierarchy_invariant: Each tier MUST be a strict subset of its parent_tier. CI check: `scripts/ops/check_openapi_drift.py` walks operationId membership across the 3 profiles and fails the build if gpt30 introduces an operationId not present in agent, or agent not present in full.
